name: Literature Explainer
description: Interactive academic paper analysis and Q&A skill with evidence verification and optional note generation.

prompts.codex: $literature-explainer : Use the uploaded paper file at `{{ input.source_path }}` and the optional language parameter `{{ parameter.language }}`. Follow SKILL.md exactly in interactive mode: normalize the source first, build initial understanding, ask for user intent, run evidence-backed Q&A when requested, and only persist the final note after the user explicitly asks for a note and confirms final save. End with a stdout JSON object.
prompts.gemini: Use skill `literature-explainer` in interactive mode. Read `{{ input.source_path }}` first, normalize it through the dispatcher, then follow the staged paper-analysis workflow in SKILL.md. Only persist the final note after explicit user request and confirmation. End with a stdout JSON object.
prompts.iflow: Use skill `literature-explainer` in interactive mode. Normalize `{{ input.source_path }}` first, then follow SKILL.md for staged paper analysis, evidence-backed Q&A, and optional note generation. Only persist the final note after explicit user request and confirmation. End with a stdout JSON object.
prompts.opencode: Use skill `literature-explainer` interactively. Normalize the uploaded file `{{ input.source_path }}` first, then execute the staged workflow from SKILL.md. Do not auto-generate a note artifact unless the user explicitly requests it and confirms the save. Finish by printing a JSON object.
